Predefined example models¶

Haldane model¶

strawberrypy.example_models.haldane.h_anderson_disorder_pythtb(model, w)[source]¶
strawberrypy.example_models.haldane.h_anderson_disorder_tbmodels(model, w)[source]¶

strawberrypy.example_models.haldane.haldane_tbmodels(delta, t, t2, phi, L)[source]¶

Kane-Mele model¶
